options.value: Please DO NOT share this article to non-STAFF Members as they will not have the permissions to view this article.

This article is part of Liferay's Customer Portal Knowledge fast-track publication program, which provides a huge library of solutions that Liferay engineers have created while supporting our customers. In order to provide the the knowledge you need the instant it becomes available, these articles may be presented in a raw and unedited form.

Liferay Support does not recommend or endorse specific third-party products over others. Liferay is not responsible for any instructions herein or referenced regarding these products. Any implementation of these principles is the responsibility of the subscriber.

Important: Liferay will support our API and resolve any issues and answer any questions having to do with the API itself or any other part of Liferay's software. Issues and questions regarding custom development may be handled by our Global Services team or by the developer of those customizations.
This article is a "legacy article". It applies to previous versions of the Liferay product. While the article is no longer maintained, the information may still be applicable.

This article is undergoing regular review and revision. The details in the article may be out of date or incorrect due to recent updates. We apologize for any inconvenience and will be updating this article shortly.
